name: Assign Cookies
description: Assume you are an awesome parent and want to give your children some cookies. Each child i has a greed factor g[i], the minimum size cookie that will make them content. Each cookie j has size s[j]. If s[j] >= g[i], you can assign cookie j to child i and the child becomes content. Maximize the number of your content children. Each child gets at most one cookie.
